mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT') AS TOTAL_STUDENTS, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT A.STD_USER_ID FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE A JOIN MEMBER M ON A.STD_USER_ID = M.USER_ID AND M.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT' WHERE A.ATND_REG_DT >= SYSDATE - 30 AND TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) IN ('02', '03', '04') GROUP BY A.STD_USER_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '02' THEN 3 WHEN TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '04' THEN 2 WHEN TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 12 )) AS RISK_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.STD_USER_ID) FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE A JOIN MEMBER M ON A.STD_USER_ID = M.USER_ID AND M.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT' WHERE A.ATND_REG_DT >= SYSDATE - 30 AND TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) IN ('02', '03', '04')) AS ATTN_ABNORMAL_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT STD_USER_ID) FROM RETENTION_PROCESS WHERE TRIM(RTNP_RSLT_CD) = '02') AS RETAINED_CNT FROM DUAL
mapper.sql:
SELECT A.STD_USER_ID, M.USER_NAME AS STUDENT_NM, (SELECT MAX(CR.CLASS_NM) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER CMB JOIN CLASSROOM CR ON CMB.CLASS_SN = CR.CLASS_SN WHERE CMB.USER_ID = A.STD_USER_ID) AS CLASS_NM, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ABSENT_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LATE_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EARLY_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '02' THEN 3 WHEN TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '04' THEN 2 WHEN TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) = '03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS RISK_SCORE, MAX(A.ATND_REG_DT) AS LAST_NOTE_DT, (SELECT LN.ATND_NOTE_CN FROM ( SELECT A2.ATND_NOTE_CN FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE A2 WHERE A2.STD_USER_ID = A.STD_USER_ID AND TRIM(A2.ATND_TYPE_CD) IN ('02', '03', '04') ORDER BY A2.ATND_REG_DT DESC ) LN WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS LAST_NOTE FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE A JOIN MEMBER M ON A.STD_USER_ID = M.USER_ID AND M.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT' WHERE A.ATND_REG_DT >= SYSDATE - 30 AND TRIM(A.ATND_TYPE_CD) IN ('02', '03', '04')
AND UPPER(M.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{detailCondition.keyword}) || '%'
GROUP BY A.STD_USER_ID, M.USER_NAME
mapper.select:
SELECT V.STD_USER_ID, V.STUDENT_NM, V.CLASS_NM, V.ABSENT_CNT, V.LATE_CNT, V.EARLY_CNT, V.RISK_SCORE, V.LAST_NOTE, V.LAST_NOTE_DT, CASE WHEN V.RISK_SCORE >= 12 THEN '고위험' WHEN V.RISK_SCORE >= 6 THEN '중위험' ELSE '저위험' END AS RISK_LEVEL FROM ( ) V
ORDER BY V.RISK_SCORE DESC, V.LAST_NOTE_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
mapper.sql:
SELECT P.STD_USER_ID, M.USER_NAME AS STUDENT_NM, (SELECT MAX(CR.CLASS_NM) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER CMB JOIN CLASSROOM CR ON CMB.CLASS_SN = CR.CLASS_SN WHERE CMB.USER_ID = P.STD_USER_ID) AS CLASS_NM, COUNT(*) AS CNSL_CNT, MAX(P.RTNP_DT) AS LAST_DT, (SELECT RC.COM_CD_NM FROM RETENTION_PROCESS LP LEFT JOIN COM_CD RC ON TRIM(RC.CL_CODE) = '203' AND TRIM(RC.COM_CD) = TRIM(LP.WDRW_RSN_CD) WHERE LP.STD_USER_ID = P.STD_USER_ID ORDER BY LP.RTNP_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS WDRW_RSN_NM, (SELECT LP.RTNP_RSLT_CD FROM RETENTION_PROCESS LP WHERE LP.STD_USER_ID = P.STD_USER_ID ORDER BY LP.RTNP_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS RTNP_RSLT_CD, (SELECT SC.COM_CD_NM FROM RETENTION_PROCESS LP LEFT JOIN COM_CD SC ON TRIM(SC.CL_CODE) = '227' AND TRIM(SC.COM_CD) = TRIM(LP.RTNP_RSLT_CD) WHERE LP.STD_USER_ID = P.STD_USER_ID ORDER BY LP.RTNP_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS RTNP_RSLT_NM, (SELECT IM.USER_NAME FROM RETENTION_PROCESS LP LEFT JOIN MEMBER IM ON LP.CHRG_USER_ID = IM.USER_ID WHERE LP.STD_USER_ID = P.STD_USER_ID ORDER BY LP.RTNP_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS CHRG_NM FROM RETENTION_PROCESS P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.STD_USER_ID = M.USER_ID
WHERE UPPER(M.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{detailCondition.keyword}) || '%'
GROUP BY P.STD_USER_ID, M.USER_NAME
mapper.select:
SELECT V.* FROM ( ) V
ORDER BY V.LAST_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT P.RTNP_SN, P.STD_USER_ID, M.USER_NAME AS STUDENT_NM, P.RTNP_DT, P.RTNP_RSLT_CD, SC.COM_CD_NM AS RTNP_RSLT_NM FROM RETENTION_PROCESS P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.STD_USER_ID = M.USER_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CD SC ON TRIM(SC.CL_CODE) = '227' AND TRIM(SC.COM_CD) = TRIM(P.RTNP_RSLT_CD) WHERE P.RTNP_DT >= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{start}, 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND P.RTNP_DT < TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{end}, 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY P.RTNP_DT
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{stdUserId} AND USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT'
